name: ASRock B650 PG LIGHTNING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Phantom Gaming 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe WiFi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2
